roles.name: My Shared Mission Control
roles.summary: A neutral whole-person starting view for values, learning, planning, life goals and governed AI boundaries before any professional role is selected.

roles.name: Healthcare Research & Innovation Leader
roles.summary: Cross-portfolio mission, evidence, implementation, human partnership and responsible innovation.

roles.name: Pre-licensure Student or Nursing Assistant
roles.summary: Foundational learning, supervised care, academic integrity, escalation, work-school balance and future formation.

roles.name: Staff Nurse & Quality Contributor
roles.summary: Practice improvement, evidence, teamwork, safe escalation, quality participation and professional renewal.

roles.name: Advanced-Practice Clinician
roles.summary: Advanced assessment support, evidence synthesis, care orchestration, professional growth and accountable judgment.

roles.name: Nurse Educator or Clinical Preceptor
roles.summary: Learner-centered design, simulation, assessment integrity, feedback, faculty workflow and evidence-based education.

roles.name: Medical Resident or Fellow
roles.summary: Postgraduate learning, care orchestration, evidence, team communication and governed AI-agent supervision.

roles.name: Nurse Leader or Healthcare Manager
roles.summary: People, quality, operations, staffing, culture, strategy and accountable organizational decisions.

roles.name: Clinic Manager
roles.summary: Access, flow, patient experience, workforce coordination, quality, capacity and community responsiveness.

roles.name: Hospital Administrator
roles.summary: Enterprise strategy, operations, quality, finance questions, governance, innovation and stakeholder alignment.

roles.name: Wellness Services Marketer or Manager
roles.summary: Ethical service design, engagement, trust, outcomes, marketing boundaries and sustainable growth.

roles.name: Quality, Safety or Governance Contributor
roles.summary: Measures, risk, improvement cycles, systems learning, escalation and responsible implementation.

roles.name: Researcher or Evidence Specialist
roles.summary: Question design, reproducible evidence, study rigor, dissemination and integrity.

roles.name: Digital Health, Informatics or Responsible-AI Leader
roles.summary: Intended use, data governance, human factors, monitoring, agent containment, kill and rollback.

roles.name: Healthcare Entrepreneur or Consultant
roles.summary: Need validation, bounded experimentation, responsible value, partnership, commercialization and scale/stop choices.

roles.name: Community, Family or Personal Advocate
roles.summary: Personal, family, business and community missions supported by safe planning, learning and service.

roles.name: Advanced Studies Overlay
roles.summary: Certification, degree, residency, fellowship, specialization or continuing professional development alongside another role.

governance_note: Role dashboards are planning contexts. Selecting a role does not verify identity, competence, licensure, employment scope, policy authority, or permission.
